settings.title: Order Placed
settings.description: Your order has been confirmed and payment verified.

settings.title: Packed
settings.description: Your sacred items are carefully wrapped and packed for safe transit.

settings.title: Shipped
settings.description: Handed over to our logistics partner. Tracking number assigned.

settings.title: Out for Delivery
settings.description: Your parcel is with the delivery agent and arriving today.

settings.title: Delivered
settings.description: Your sacred items have arrived. May they bring peace and positivity.

settings.heading: Track Your Spiritual Journey
settings.subtext: Enter your Viha order ID and the email address used at checkout to get real-time updates on your sacred items.
settings.help_text: Your order confirmation email contains your Order ID. If you still can't find it,
settings.courier_subtext: Once your order ships you will receive a tracking number by SMS/WhatsApp. Find your courier below and enter your number on their site.
settings.courier_note: International orders: tracking IDs are usually available within about 5 days of dispatch. A single international order may ship in more than one parcel — for example silver items via India Post and other items via DTDC — each with its own tracking number.
